text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to eat lunch, when... I smell something
out of this world!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
HAH-HAHAHA! Success! I've really outdone
myself now! What an amazing class representative
I am!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Only I could make a sandwich as amazing and fantastic as this!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Cough! Cough! Smells like something's burning! Is everything all right, Bakushin O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Well, if it isn't Flower, my fellow genius!
Everything's A-OK in here! You're just in time to
see my culinary masterpiece!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Then all that black stuff is... Never mind. So you
cooked this? This... uh...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yes! I've boiled an egg... for an egg sandwich!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The whole class shall be invigorated by my
gourmet Bakushin-style cooking!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Bakushin-style... cooking?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Indeed! Cooking is all about speed, you see!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: The flames go whoosh! And the oil spits up! And at the end you turn the heat to max and PRESTO! You've boiled an egg!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What do you think? Sounds amazing, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Is that really how you boil... Ah, yes. I... I see...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Speed is important, isn't it? Nothing beats a piping-hot meal.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But, um... Something tells me that's not all there is
to cooking...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: What? It's not?! But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No, wait. I get it now! Completely! Truly!
One-hundred percent!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew... That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What you're saying is, to merely Bakushin is not
enough. I must Bakushin to the max!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll start over at once!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh, what?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Throw everything into the frying pan! Then turn
the heat to high... No! EXTREME SUPER MAX!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Uh, um, ah! I think it's better if you just follow the
recip—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BAAAM!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh no! Are you all right?!
